case.title: FISHERIES PRODUCTS CO. v. ABRAHAM S SEE & DEPEW

opinion.h1: FISHERIES PRODUCTS CO. v. ABRAHAM S SEE & DEPEW, 269 U.S. 566 (1925)
opinion.h2: The FISHERIES PRODUCTS COMPANY et al., Receivers of The Fisheries Products Company, petitioners, v. ABRAHAM S. SEE & DEPEW, Inc.* No. 644.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. T. D. Warren, of Newbern, N. C., for petitioners.
Petition for a writ of certiorari to the United States Circuit Court of Appeals for the Second Circuit denied.

[Footnote *] No opinion filed below on order sought to be reviewed, but see 5 F.( 2d) 1011, and 9 F.(2d) 235, for other phases of same litigation.[ Fisheries Products Co v. Abraham S See & Depew 269 U.S. 566 (1925) ]
